boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on calibration-status class closure
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-GAC-087-P requires calibration-status class match before activation
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pending CP-77 and status-class verification block activation

final_answer: Action may not proceed. CAL-GAC-087 indicates the CP-77 calibration pack is pending, and STD-GAC-087-P mandates a verified calibration-status class before activation. WARN-GAC-087 reinforces the need for separate verification. The source boundary remains open due to these unresolved defects, necessitating escalation for resolution prior to any device activation.
